description: Playground equipment with visible cracks, rust holes, or structural deformation
Playground protective surfacing degraded, compacted, or displaced below required depth for fall height
Ceiling tiles showing water stains, sagging, or displacement indicating moisture intrusion
visual_signals: brown ring stain on ceiling tile

description: Walkway trip hazard from raised concrete joints, cracked pavement, or uneven surfaces
Exterior door propped open with wedge or object defeating lockdown and security protocols
visual_signals: rock or wedge at door base
exterior door ajar with no staff present

description: Exit sign missing, not illuminated, or obscured along required egress path
visual_signals: sign blocked by banner or decoration

description: Science lab chemicals stored outside approved cabinets or without proper segregation
Stairwell handrail loose, detached from wall mount, or missing sections
AED unit inaccessible due to blocked cabinet, missing signage, or location beyond recommended response distance
visual_signals: no AED sign visible in corridor

description: Bus loading zone markings faded, missing, or conflicting with pedestrian walkways
visual_signals: pedestrian path crossing unmarked bus lane

description: Standing water or ice accumulation on walkways creating slip hazard for students and staff
